title: VibeWarden Configuration Schema v1
description: Schema for the vibewarden.yaml configuration file. All VibeWarden configuration lives in vibewarden.yaml at the root of your project. Every field can also be set via an environment variable — the variable name is the YAML key path uppercased and prefixed with VIBEWARDEN_, with dots replaced by underscores.

profile.description: Selects the deployment profile. Affects TLS settings, credential validation strictness, and which generated files are produced.

server.description: Settings for the VibeWarden HTTP listener.

upstream.description: Settings for the upstream application being protected.

app.description: Controls how your application is included in the generated Docker Compose file. When neither build nor image is set, no app service is rendered and VibeWarden falls back to host.docker.internal.

build.description: Docker build context path (e.g. '.') -- used in dev/tls profiles.

image.description: Docker image reference (e.g. 'ghcr.io/org/myapp:latest') -- used in prod profile.

tls.description: TLS configuration for the VibeWarden listener.

domain.description: Domain for the TLS certificate. Required when provider is 'letsencrypt'.

cert_path.description: Path to PEM certificate. Required when provider is 'external'.

key_path.description: Path to PEM private key. Required when provider is 'external'.

storage_path.description: Directory for ACME certificate storage. Applies to 'letsencrypt' only.

public_paths.description: Glob patterns that bypass auth. /_vibewarden/* is always public.

identity_schema.description: Identity schema: 'email_password', 'email_only', 'username_password', 'social', or a file path.

jwt.description: JWT authentication settings. Used when auth.mode is 'jwt'.

jwks_url.description: Direct JWKS endpoint URL. Takes precedence over issuer_url.

issuer_url.description: OIDC issuer base URL for auto-discovery.

claims_to_headers.description: JWT claims injected as upstream request headers. Keys are claim names, values are header names.

allowed_algorithms.description: Accepted signing algorithms. Never include 'none' or 'HS256' in production.

cache_ttl.description: How long the JWKS is cached locally (duration string, e.g. '1h').

api_key.description: API key authentication settings. Used when auth.mode is 'api-key'.

header.description: Request header carrying the API key.

hash.description: Hex-encoded SHA-256 of the plaintext key.

scopes.description: Permission scopes granted to this key.

openbao_path.description: KV path in OpenBao where key hashes are stored.

cache_ttl.description: TTL for keys fetched from OpenBao (duration string, e.g. '5m').

path.description: Glob pattern matched against the request path.

methods.description: HTTP methods this rule applies to (empty = all methods).

social_providers.description: List of OAuth2/OIDC social login providers (used with auth.mode: kratos).

scopes.description: OAuth2 scopes to request (optional; provider defaults apply).

app_name.description: Application name on built-in login pages.

login_url.description: Custom login page URL (when mode: custom).

kratos.description: Ory Kratos configuration. Used when auth.mode is 'kratos'.

external.description: Connect to a user-managed Kratos instance instead of starting one.

store.description: Backing store for rate limit counters.

trust_proxy_headers.description: Read X-Forwarded-For for client IP. Enable only behind a trusted proxy.

exempt_paths.description: Glob patterns that bypass rate limiting. /_vibewarden/* is always exempt.

redis.description: Redis backing store configuration. Only read when store is 'redis'.

url.description: Redis URL (redis:// or rediss://). Takes precedence over all other fields.

pool_size.description: Connection pool size. 0 means auto based on CPU count.

fallback.description: Fail-open on Redis failure (true) or fail-closed (false).

health_check_interval.description: How often to probe Redis for recovery (duration string, e.g. '30s').

hsts_max_age.description: HSTS max-age in seconds (1 year default).

frame_option.description: X-Frame-Options value. Set to empty string to disable.

content_security_policy.description: Content-Security-Policy value. Empty by default; set explicitly to opt in.

suppress_via_header.description: Remove Via header from proxied responses.

allowed_origins.description: Permitted origins. Use ["*"] for development only.

allow_credentials.description: Set Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true. Must not be combined with allowed_origins: ["*"].

max_age.description: Preflight cache duration in seconds. 0 omits the header.

waf.description: Built-in Web Application Firewall. Inspects every inbound request for common attack patterns in-process, with no external dependencies.

mode.description: Detection mode: 'block' rejects with 400, 'detect' passes through and logs.

rules.description: Per-rule toggles. All rules are enabled by default when waf.enabled is true.

sqli.description: Detect SQL injection patterns in query strings and request bodies.

enabled.description: Enable Content-Type validation on body-bearing requests.

allowed.description: Permitted media types. Requests with other types receive 415 Unsupported Media Type.

max.description: Global maximum body size (e.g. '1MB', '512KB'). Empty means no limit.
Maximum body size for this path.

timeout.description: Upstream response timeout. '0' disables the timeout (duration string, e.g. '30s').

threshold.description: Consecutive failures to trip the circuit.

timeout.description: How long the circuit stays open before probing (duration string, e.g. '60s').

max_attempts.description: Total attempts including the initial request.

backoff.description: Wait before the first retry (duration string, e.g. '100ms').

max_backoff.description: Upper bound on computed backoff (duration string, e.g. '10s').

retry_on.description: HTTP status codes that trigger a retry.

path_patterns.description: URL path normalization patterns using :param syntax.

endpoint.description: OTLP HTTP endpoint URL. Required when otlp.enabled is true.

otlp.description: Export structured events via OTLP. Requires otlp.endpoint.

observability.description: Controls generation of the optional local observability stack (Grafana, Prometheus, Loki, Promtail).

external_url.description: Full postgres:// connection URL. When set, the local Postgres container is omitted from the generated Compose file.

egress.description: Egress proxy plugin configuration. Controls outbound HTTP requests from your application.

listen.description: TCP address the egress proxy binds to.

default_policy.description: Disposition for requests that match no route.

allow_insecure.description: Permit plain HTTP egress requests globally. Per-route allow_insecure overrides this.

default_timeout.description: Request timeout applied when a route does not specify its own (duration string, e.g. '30s').

default_body_size_limit.description: Global maximum request body size (e.g. '10MB'). Empty means no limit.

default_response_size_limit.description: Global maximum response body size (e.g. '50MB'). Empty means no limit.

block_private.description: Block requests to RFC 1918 private, loopback, and reserved IP ranges.

routes.description: Ordered list of egress route definitions. Routes are evaluated in declaration order; the first matching route wins.

name.description: Unique human-readable identifier for this route.

pattern.description: URL glob matched against outbound request URLs (must start with http:// or https://).

methods.description: HTTP methods this route applies to. Empty means all methods.

timeout.description: Per-route request timeout. Empty uses egress.default_timeout.

secret.description: OpenBao KV path of the secret to fetch and inject.

secret_header.description: Request header to inject the secret value into (e.g. 'Authorization').

secret_format.description: Value template -- {value} is replaced with the resolved secret (e.g. 'Bearer {value}').

rate_limit.description: Rate limit expression (e.g. '100/s', '500/m'). Empty means no per-route limit.

body_size_limit.description: Maximum request body size. Empty uses egress.default_body_size_limit.

response_size_limit.description: Maximum response body size. Empty uses egress.default_response_size_limit.

allow_insecure.description: Permit plain HTTP for this route, overriding the global setting.

threshold.description: Consecutive failures to trip the circuit. Must be > 0.

reset_after.description: How long the circuit stays open before allowing a probe request.

max.description: Maximum retry attempts (not counting the initial request). Must be >= 1.

methods.description: HTTP methods eligible for retry. Empty uses the default idempotent set.

mtls.description: Mutual TLS configuration for this route.

cert_path.description: Filesystem path to the PEM-encoded client certificate.

key_path.description: Filesystem path to the PEM-encoded private key.

ca_path.description: Filesystem path to a PEM-encoded CA bundle used to verify the server's certificate (optional; uses system roots when empty).

status_codes.description: Allowed HTTP status code expressions (e.g. ['2xx', '301']). Empty means no validation.

content_types.description: Allowed MIME type prefixes (e.g. ['application/json']). Empty means no validation.

cache.description: In-memory response caching for this route.

enabled.description: Activate in-memory response caching for this route.

ttl.description: Cache entry lifetime. Zero means never expire (not recommended).

max_size.description: Maximum cached response body size in bytes. Zero means no per-entry limit.

headers.description: Header names whose values are replaced with [REDACTED] in log events (forwarded request is unchanged).

query_params.description: Query parameter names stripped from the URL before forwarding.

body_fields.description: JSON field names replaced with [REDACTED] in the request body before forwarding. Only applied when Content-Type is application/json.

headers.description: Header manipulation rules for this route.

inject.description: Static headers added to (or overwriting) the outbound request.

strip_request.description: Request header names removed before forwarding upstream.

strip_response.description: Response header names removed from the upstream response before returning to the app. Server and X-Powered-By are always stripped.

cache_ttl.description: How long fetched secrets are cached in memory (duration string, e.g. '5m').

headers.description: Secrets injected as HTTP request headers.

env_file.description: Path to write a .env file with secret values.

env.description: Secrets written to the env file.

roles.description: OpenBao database roles to request credentials for.

env_var_user.description: Env var to write the generated username into.

env_var_password.description: Env var to write the generated password into.

check_interval.description: How often to run secret health checks (duration string, e.g. '6h').

max_static_age.description: Maximum acceptable age of a static secret (duration string, e.g. '2160h' for 90 days).

weak_patterns.description: Substrings that indicate a weak or default secret.

webhooks.description: Webhook delivery configuration for audit events.

endpoints.description: Webhook endpoints to deliver audit events to.

url.description: HTTP(S) endpoint to POST events to.

events.description: Event types to deliver. Use ["*"] to subscribe to all.

output.description: Write destination: 'stdout' or a file path.

token.description: Bearer token for admin API authentication.

overrides.description: Escape hatches for advanced users. All fields are optional.

kratos_config.description: Path to a custom kratos.yml file. When set, VibeWarden uses it instead of generating one.

compose_file.description: Path to a custom docker-compose.yml file.

identity_schema.description: Path to a custom Kratos identity schema JSON file.
